summary: Plan-only inventory classification over five open PRs. No canonical is selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. No close, merge, fix, label, or comment mutations are recommended.

actions.reason: Distinct UI feature PR with useful code and failed proof gates; not duplicate, superseded, low-signal-close eligible, or merge-ready.
